name: food-scanner-runner
description: Root package manager to start both frontend and backend

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k -c "blue,green" -n "FRONTEND,BACKEND" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend
